description: Implement a hierarchical Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system in the 'demodb' database using vertex classes 'AppUser', 'AppGroup', and 'AppResource', and edge classes 'MemberOf' and 'HasAccess' (with a String property 'level'). Define a structure where 'Engineering_Leads' is a MemberOf 'Software_Engineers', and 'Software_Engineers' is a MemberOf 'Full_Time_Staff'. Assign 'sarah.connor' as a MemberOf 'Engineering_Leads' and 'john.smith' as a MemberOf 'Full_Time_Staff'. Grant 'Engineering_Leads' 'admin' access to 'aws_prod_keys', 'Software_Engineers' 'write' access to 'git_repository', and 'Full_Time_Staff' 'read' access to 'office_wifi'. Audit all resources 'sarah.connor' can access, including those inherited through the group hierarchy, and export the results as a JSON array to '/home/ga/sarah_entitlements.json' in the format: [{"resource": "name", "permission": "level", "via_group": "group_name"}, ...].
